titleStmt.title: SII 34.299: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 299. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the north and west walls of the old kitchen in the first prākāra in the Haratīrthēśvara temple.

summary.p: This registers the gift of a village as tirunāmattukkāṇi and kuḍi-nīṅgā-kārāṅkiḻamai by Kuḍumiyār Aḻagiyamaṇavāḷa-perumāḷ Toṇḍaimāṉār, Sundarapāṇḍiya-toṇḍaimāṉār and Sūriyadēvar Toṇḍaimāṉār, who were the arasu chiefs of Aṟantāṅgi in Iḷaṅgō-nāḍu a sub-division of Vaḍa-Veḷḷāṟu alias Sundara-pāṇḍya-vaḷanāḍu, for conducting the service called Malvallāṉ-sandhi. The donors also decided to give up in favour of the temple the dues collected towards their arasu-sutandaram in the locality.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
sakāttam Āyirattu muṉṉūṟṟu Añcil mēl cellāniṉṟa Utirōṟkāri varuṣam kārttikai mātam pattoṉpatāntiyati nāḷ Irācarācavaḷa nāṭṭu valla nāṭṭut tiruvaraṉ kuḷattu U
ṭaiya nāyinār Āticaṇṭēcura tēvaṟku vaṭaveḷḷāṟāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya vaḷanāṭṭu Iḷaṅkō nāṭṭu Aṟantāṅki Aracu kuṭumiyār Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷapperumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉārum cūriya tēvar cuntarapāṇṭi
ya mēṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷ kulacēkarat toṇṭaimāṉārum Āka Immūvarōm malvallāṉ cantikkut tirunāmattukkāṇi Ākak kuṭinīṅkāk kārāṅkiḻamai Āka viṭṭa ceṉṉilattūr nāṭṭil Ayya
māḷ toṇṭaimāṉārum koṇṭu maiyaṉ Araiya veṭṭi Āṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷa nallūr nāṭṭuppaṭi puravu nilam Āṟumāvum Ikkuḷattakavāyil Aṇṇāḻvi malvalla perumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉā
katal taṭi muṟṟum Āka Ivvayalukkum Icceykkum perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kīḻpāṟkellai kuṟumpil kayakarāyaṉ Utirappaṭṭiyil kīḻvarampukkum poykaiyil kuḷattakavāyil cokaṇṭa pantalil kīḻum
mēṟkum teṉpāṟkellai ceṉṉilattūr nāṭṭuk kuḷattukkarai ceṉṟa cevvaikku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai ceṉṉilattūr nāyiṉār tēvatāṉam Amaraṭakkavayalukkum pālaiyūr nāṭṭil koṟṟamaṅkalattil pura
l Ivar Ākkiṉa malvalla perumāḷ vayakkalukkum kuṟumpilil malukkaṉ Uṭampaṉ kurupai vayakku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai kuṟumpilil cokkaraiyaṉ Uṭaiyāḷ vayakkalukkum Āyam vaṭalukkum teṟkum Āka Icaintaperu
yum Ivvūrukku Uṭpaṭṭa camattappiṟāttikaḷilum paḷḷiccantam paḻantēvataṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam Ayyaṉ pātti piṭari viḷākam Utirap
paṭṭi Iḷaṅkōvaraiyar taṇ maṟaiyili Āṉa cokkaṉ vayakkalu Āka Ivva kkāṇi Āka viṭṭut tiruccūlattāpaṉam paṇṇikuṭuttu Ivvayalukku nāṭṭu mariyāti peṟum Aracucutantaramum maṟṟum Ivvūrkaḷil nāṅkaḷ peṟum cutantaramāṉa Eppēṟpaṭṭaṉavum pālaiyūr nāṭṭil koṟṟamaṅkalat
Uḷḷatum Āka Ivvakaipaṭṭa Uḷḷavai Aṭaṅkalāka malvalāṉ cantikku nāṅkaḷ viṭṭa Aḷavukku Araiya veṭṭi Āṉa Aḻakiya maṇavāḷanallūṟkkum niṉṟa paṟṟu Ōṭum vayakkalukkum varum Irācakaram vēṇṭukōḷ viṉiyōkam Āḷtē
kavum Ippaṭikku kallilum cempilum veṭṭikuṭuttōm Ippaṭikku Uṭaiyār Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ toṇṭaimāṉārum cūriya tēvar cuntarapāṇṭiyat toṇṭaimāṉārum mēṉṉiṉṟa perumāḷ kulacēkarat toṇṭaimāṉārum Aruḷic ceyal pa
Digital edition of SII 34.299 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
